name: carrefour-qa-automation
description: Senior QA Automation Framework - Mobile (WebdriverIO/Appium) and API (Supertest)

scripts.install:all: cd api-tests && npm install && cd ../mobile-tests && npm install
scripts.test:mobile: cd mobile-tests && npx wdio run wdio.conf.js
scripts.test: npm run install:all && npm run test:api
